title: Battalions of Zhell
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Battalions of Zhell''' were the combined military strength of the thirteen nations of [[Zhell/Legends|Zhell]]. The Battalions fought the [[Taung/Legends|Taung]] [[Species/Legends|species]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Notron]] in a [[Zhell–Taung war|war]] for control of their shared [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], and the Zhell emerged victorious.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Codex}}
